fields.Name: Run Record Process
fields.Description: Runs a Record Process (MJ: Record Processes) on a cron schedule via the RecordSetProcessor engine — iterating the process's scoped record set (View / List / Filter) and applying its configured Action or Agent work with batching, bounded concurrency, rate limiting, and pause/resume. Each run is tracked in MJ: Process Runs. Configuration: { "RecordProcessID": "<id>" }.
